docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO AS TO STEVEN YUNG AS AGENT FOR DEFENDANT V5 SYSTEMS, INC. ON JUN-08-2021 - OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF KEVIN P. WHITEFORD, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF DE LANGE LANDEN FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO STEVEN YUNG, AS AGENT FOR DEFENDANT V5 SYSTEMS, INC., ON AUG-10-2021 - OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF KEVIN P.
